name: Peach Melba Snack
recipeIngredient: 1 medium peach - cut into 1/8-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread half a teaspoon of fruit spread on each melba round.
2. Top with two peach slices; sprinkle with brown sugar.
3. Arrange six toasts in a microwave dish.
4. Microwave on High until the sugar melts, about 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Repeat with remaining snacks.
Makes 12 servings. Preparation time: About 10 minutes. Microwave time: About 35 to 40 minutes.
Per serving: About 22 calories, 0 grams protein, 6 grams carbohydrates, 0 grams fat, 4% calories from fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 16 milligrams sodium, 0 grams fiber.
